description_long: This is a military armored combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a rotating turret mounted centrally on the hull. The vehicle features a set of seven large road wheels on each side, supporting continuous tracks for all-terrain mobility. Its exterior is covered in a multi-tone camouflage paint scheme, blending light green, beige, and dark green patches in irregular shapes. The turret is equipped with a visible main gun and a smaller secondary mount, while the hull displays sloped armor panels for increased protection. The vehicle's surface appears rugged and matte, with hatches, vents, and periscopes integrated into the design. No visible military insignia or numbers are present on the exterior.
description: Armored combat vehicle with a central turret, seven road wheels per side, and a multi-tone camouflage paint scheme. Features sloped armor and rugged, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the vehicle, seven road wheels, and the central turret with its main gun.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back armor, exhaust vents, and the rear of the turret.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the seven wheels, tracks, and the turret's side profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the sloped frontal armor, front hatches, and the main gun protruding from the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main gun mount on the turret and a secondary mount adjacent to it, both located on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped armor panels, moderate thickness, and reinforced turret and front hull sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Irregular woodland camouflage with light green, beige, and dark green patches in a disruptive pattern.
